creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Mark Linimon from comment #9)

These days, FreeBSD would use imported main-line
Linux DTB's for the Zybo Z7 board that are newer
than 2020.07 U-Boot was tied to. Linux dtb's
need not be compatible over time: it tracks
Linux kernel changes.

It is not obvious if the combination would work
vs. not --unless it has been tested.
